metadata.title: Open with
metadata.description: This Plugin allows you to add multiple other programs to open notes with.

regex.source: .setDesc("Add a new application to open files with. You need to use the application path or command (for example \"code\" for VSCode) and arguments need to be comma seperated.")
regex.target: .setDesc("添加一个新的应用程序来打开文件。您需要使用应用程序路径或命令(例如VSCode的\"code\")，参数需要用逗号分隔。")

regex.source: new obsidian.Notice("Display Name & Path/Command are always neccessary.");
regex.target: new obsidian.Notice("显示名称和路径/命令总是必要的。");

regex.source: new obsidian.Notice("You need to restart Obsidian for these changes to take effect.");
regex.target: new obsidian.Notice("需要重新启动 Obsidian 才能使这些更改生效。");
.setName('在 文件 菜单中显示"在系统资源管理器中显示"')

regex.source: .setDesc('Show the enhanced "Show in system explorer" command in File-Menus')
regex.target: .setDesc('显示增强 "在系统资源管理器中显示"  文件 菜单中的命令')
